title: Conversation
description: Conversation component enables chat-like interactions, providing an input area for users to type messages and a view section to display the conversation. It's ideal for real-time messaging in chat-based applications.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using conversation.

sections.title: Custom Component
sections.description: Using your custom component in conversation.

sections.title: Infinite Scroll
sections.description: Load older messages when reaching the end of the list.

props.name: chatData
props.description: Array of chat messages to display in the conversation.

props.name: chatBoxHeight
props.description: Height of the chat box view.

props.name: isReplyArrowShown
props.description: Controls whether the reply arrow is shown.

props.name: avatar
props.description: Template reference for custom avatar display.

events.name: onScrollEnd
events.description: Emitted when the user scrolls to the end of the conversation view.

events.name: onActionMenuOpening
events.description: Emitted when the action menu is about to open.

events.name: onAction
events.description: Emitted when an action is performed within the conversation view.

events.name: onReplyClick
events.description: Emitted when the reply button is clicked.

methods.content:
/**
 * Updates the previous items in the conversation by prepending new items to the beginning of the chat list.
 *
 * @param item - Array of items to prepend to the conversation.
 */
updatePrevItems(item: any[]): void

/**
 * Calls for an update by emitting the onScrollEnd event.
 */
callForUpdate(): void

/**
 * Adds a new item to the end of the conversation chat list.
 *
 * @param item - The item to add to the conversation.
 */
addNewItem(item: any): void

props.name: isReplyArrowShown
props.description: Controls whether the reply arrow is shown.

props.name: chatMessage
props.description: The conversation message data to display.

props.name: avatar
props.description: Template reference for custom avatar display.

events.name: onActionMenuOpening
events.description: Emitted when the action menu is about to open.

events.name: onReplyClick
events.description: Emitted when the reply button is clicked.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input box.

props.name: hasAttachment
props.description: Indicates if an attachment is present.

props.name: hasVoice
props.description: Indicates if voice recording is enabled.

props.name: hasEmoji
props.description: Indicates if emoji picker is enabled.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Indicates if the component is in a loading state.

events.name: onSendClick
events.description: Emitted when the send button is clicked.

events.name: onCancelRecording
events.description: Emitted when audio recording is canceled.

events.name: onEnterPressed
events.description: Emitted when the Enter key is pressed in the input box.

props.name: audioBlobs
props.description: Array of audio blob data collected during recording.

props.name: mediaRecorder
props.description: The MediaRecorder instance used for audio recording.

props.name: streamBeingCaptured
props.description: The media stream being captured for recording.

props.name: timer
props.description: Signal containing the formatted recording time string.

methods.content:
/**
 * Starts audio recording using the browser's MediaRecorder API.
 *
 * @returns Promise<void> - Resolves when recording starts successfully, rejects if not supported.
 */
startRecording(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Ends the current recording session and returns the recorded audio blob.
 *
 * @returns Promise<Blob> - Resolves with the recorded audio blob.
 */
endRecording(): Promise<Blob>

/**
 * Calculates and updates the recording time, incrementing seconds, minutes, and hours as needed.
 */
calculateTime(): void

/**
 * Resets the recording timer to zero and clears the timer interval.
 */
resetTimer(): void
